paper_title: STUDY ON FOLATE STABILITY DURING THERMAL PROCESSING

entities.description: The ability of folate to remain unchanged under various environmental conditions such as pH and temperature.
The use of heat to treat substances, specifically looking at its effect on folate degradation.
A model describing the degradation of folates where the rate depends on the concentration of one reactant.
An analytical technique used to measure residual folate concentration after thermal treatment.
A specific HPLC machine used for folate identification and quantification.
A formula used to describe the temperature dependence of the degradation rate constant.
Equipment used to determine folate concentrations based on absorbance.
A chemical solution used in the preparation of folate stock solutions.
The study of the physical, biological, and chemical makeup of food.
Primary author of the research paper.
